notes: Stable release 7.1.0 from 7.0.1 placeholder. New api-versions 2026-01-01, 2026-02-01, 2026-05-01 added to KnownVersions. New features: CostManagementSettings, ImmutabilityConfiguration, GranularityLevel, ImmutabilityType. Added begin* deprecated compat methods for LRO operations. New no-subscriptionId constructor overload. getOperationResult return type null->undefined (acceptable breaking). Versions aligned across package.json/CHANGELOG/context file. No naming, type-safety, or export issues found.
